result.stdout:
jj-mediate - Intelligent conflict resolution for Jujutsu

USAGE:
  jj-mediate [OPTIONS] [FILE]

OPTIONS:
  -h, --help              Show this help message
  -v, --version           Show version information
  -q, --quiet             Quiet mode (minimal output)
  --no-trivial            Don't resolve trivial conflicts
  --no-reduce             Don't reduce conflicts
  --no-indentation        Don't handle indentation differences
  --no-added-lines        Don't detect added lines on both sides
  --no-line-endings       Don't normalize line endings
  --no-split              Don't split conflicts on ~~~~~~~ markers
  --untabify=N            Expand tabs to N spaces

ARGUMENTS:
  FILE                    Specific file to resolve (optional)
                          If not specified, resolves all conflicted files

EXAMPLES:
  jj-mediate              Resolve all conflicts in repository
  jj-mediate file.cs      Resolve conflicts in specific file
  jj-mediate --untabify=4 Resolve with tab expansion
